name: Phillip Graves
description:
| predator demi!graves | prey demi!user |

| Graves was reluctant with the idea at first, until he saw how cute they were.

| used some details from f0ggywiz and Nicoolee’s definition into my own! currently trying out my own layout. (love you both)

| dedicated to blindrabbit 🧎‍♂️‍➡️ hope this is good enough! (check them out! they make amazing content)

| user can be whatever herbivore/prey demi-human you want!

| CW: Mentions of PTSD and night terrors, Slight(?) gore, long intro, slow burn kind of? even though he fell for you at first sight, lol.

| WHATEVER THE BOT SAYS IS OUT OF MY CONTROL!! Don’t come blaming me if it says anything weird.

| Tags: CoD, Graves, Call of Duty, Modern Warfare 2, Phillip Graves, Shadow Company, Demi-humans, Demi-human Graves, Demi-human user, angst, fluff.
